socialProof.quote: Tracks my credit customers so I don't forget who owes me.

cta.heading: Ready to digitize your shop?
cta.desc: Download free today. No credit card, no commitment.

footer.tagline: The digital ledger for your shop. Fast. Offline. Trusted.
footer.made: Made with ♥ for small businesses in Nepal

hero.h1Tagline: The Most Reliable Business System for Nepal Shops.
hero.desc: Record sales in seconds. Track who owes you money. Know your profit — even when the internet is out.

sales.title: Lightning-fast sales
sales.desc: Log a cash or credit sale in under 10 seconds. No training needed.

inventory.title: Inventory alerts
inventory.desc: Auto low-stock detection — know before you run out.

credit.title: Customer credit ledger
credit.desc: Track who owes you, how much, and for how long. No forgotten debts.

reports.title: Profit & cashflow reports
reports.desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly business health — sales, expenses, profit.

offline.title: Fully offline
offline.desc: Works with zero internet. Auto-syncs the moment connectivity is restored.

invoices.title: PDF invoices
invoices.desc: Generate and send professional invoices to your customers in one tap.

howItWorks.label: How it Works
howItWorks.heading: Up and running in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtext: No IT department. No setup fee. Just download and go.

one.title: Create your store
one.desc: Sign up free. Set your currency, business type, and VAT in under 2 minutes.
one.tag: NPR · USD · INR — Grocery, Pharmacy, Electronics & more
one.detail: No credit card. No setup fee.

two.title: Add your products
two.desc: Enter names, sell price, cost price, and starting stock. Works on any Android phone.
two.tag: 100 products on Free · Unlimited on Pro
two.detail: Import or add one by one.

three.title: Start selling
three.desc: Record cash and credit sales in seconds. Dashboard updates in real time — even offline.
three.detail: Sales, expenses, profit — all in one view.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Simple pricing. Start free.
pricing.subtext: No credit card required. Upgrade whenever you're ready.

free.desc: Access core features at no cost, forever.
